response.justification: The candidate lacks direct C++ experience in industrial automation or high-performance systems, with only a brief, non-detailed mention of C++ in a 2014 role; their recent work is overwhelmingly in TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang, with no evidence of STL, multi-threading, message brokers, IEC 62443, or industrial IoT protocols required for the role.
strengths: Strong full-stack and cross-platform development experience
Demonstrated leadership in open-source and community technical initiatives
Extensive background in event-driven systems and DevOps infrastructure
concerns: No recent or substantial C++ development experience in required domains
Lacks exposure to industrial cybersecurity standards (IEC 62443) and protocol expertise (MQTT, OPC UA, etc.)
Primary tech stack is web-focused (TypeScript/Node.js), not aligned with on-premises C++ performance systems
